body:
<rss  version="2">
  <channel>
    <title>USDA - National Agricultural Statistics Service Reports</title>
    <link>https://www.nass.usda.gov/</link>
    <description>National Agricultural Statistics Service provides timely, accurate, and useful statistics in service to U. S. agriculture.</description>
    <language>en-us</language>
    <ttl>30</ttl>
    <image>
      <url>https://www.nass.usda.gov/rss/logo.gif</url>
      <title>USDA - National Agricultural Statistics Service Reports</title>
      <link>https://www.nass.usda.gov/</link>
    </image>
    <copyright>Copyright 2005</copyright>
    <webMaster>nass@nass.usda.gov</webMaster>
    <item>
      <title>North American Potatoes</title>
      <link>http://www.nass.usda.gov/Publications/Todays_Reports/reports/uscp0226.pdf</link>
      <description>Combined United States and Canada Potato Production Down 2 Percent From 2024...</description>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Peanut Prices</title>
      <link>http://www.nass.usda.gov/Publications/Todays_Reports/reports/pnpr0626.pdf</link>
      <description>Peanut Price Highlights. Peanut prices received by farmers for all farmer stock peanuts averaged 23.5 cents per pound for the week ending January 31, up 0.4...</description>
    </item>
  </channel>
</rss>
